name: Triticale Bread Machine Made
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order suggested by your bread machine manual.
2. Process on the basic bread cycle according to the manufacturer's directions.
Note: Triticale is a nutritious grain that is a hybrid of wheat and rye. It can be found in most health food stores. It adds to the taste but not much to the rising of bread. In combination with wheat flour, it makes good bread for sandwiches or toast, with a pleasant but unobtrusive flavor.
